---
title: "Make a Plot"
---

```{python}
import polars as pl
import plotnine_polars

gapminder = pl.read_csv(
    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jennybc/gapminder/main/inst/extdata/gapminder.tsv",
    separator="\t"
)

gapminder.head()
```

```{python}
p = gapminder.ggplot()
```

```{python}
p = (
    gapminder
    .ggplot()
    .aes(x = "gdpPercap", y = "lifeExp")
)
```

```{python}
p
```

```{python}
p.geom_point()
```

```{python}
(
    gapminder
    .ggplot()
    .aes(x = "gdpPercap",y = "lifeExp")
    .geom_smooth(method="loess")
)
```

```{python}
from plotnine import ggplot, aes, geom_smooth, geom_point, labs
from plotnine.data import mpg
p = ggplot(data = gapminder,
           mapping = aes(x = "gdpPercap",
                          y = "lifeExp"))
p + geom_point() + geom_smooth(method="loess")
```

```{python}
(
    ggplot(mpg, aes(x="displ", y="hwy"))
    + geom_point()
    + geom_smooth()
    + labs(x="displacement", y="horsepower")
)
```
